# CONTEXT

*This is the first file Claude reads at the start of every session. Keep it current. Update it when your priorities, ventures, or working style changes materially.*

*This file is generated during FIRST_RUN setup. The placeholder structure below shows what belongs here.*

---

## Who I Am

**Name:** *(your name)*
**Location:** *(city, country)*
**Role:** *(what you do — e.g. founder, consultant, analyst, freelancer)*

*(2–3 sentences on your professional identity and what you're building or working on)*

---

## Ventures / Current Work

*(List your active work contexts — jobs, businesses, side projects. One line each. What it is, your role, current status.)*

---

## Strategic Priorities — Next 3–6 Months

*(What are you trying to accomplish? These are the big goals that should inform every session. 3–5 bullet points.)*

---

## How I Work

*(Describe your working style — what you want from AI, how direct/detailed you like responses, what you find annoying, anything you want the system to remember.)*

**Communication style:** *(e.g. short and direct / detailed and thorough)*
**Editing preference:** *(e.g. I edit markdown directly in Obsidian / I prefer doing everything in chat)*
**Scheduled tasks:** *(e.g. weekly automated check-ins on Monday morning / trigger manually)*

---

## What I Track

*(Topics you follow, domains you invest in, companies or people you keep files on)*

---

## What I Don't Want
